content.text:
<output>{
  "themeMovement": [
    { "theme": "service", "delta": 2, "direction": "up" },
    { "theme": "wait_time", "delta": 3, "direction": "up" },
    { "theme": "product_quality", "delta": -1, "direction": "down" }
  ],
  "topPatterns": [
    {
      "patternId": "wait-time-staffing-review",
      "title": "Review peak-hour staffing levels against last quarter's rota",
      "tailoredBody": "Three Reviews this week called out long waits on the Friday lunch shift. Compare last quarter's rota for that slot against what is on the floor now — most wait-time clusters trace back to a single under-staffed shift pattern.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-wait-1", "starRating": 2, "redactedQuote": "Waited 25 minutes for a sandwich at lunch on Friday.", "themes": ["wait_time"] },
        { "reviewId": "r-wait-2", "starRating": 3, "redactedQuote": "Long queue at the till around midday — fewer staff than usual.", "themes": ["wait_time", "service"] }
      ]
    },
    {
      "patternId": "service-recovery-outreach",
      "title": "Run a service-recovery outreach to the week's unhappy Reviewers",
      "tailoredBody": "You have two 1-2 star Reviews this week from regulars who say they felt ignored. A short personal apology in the next 24 hours typically halves the chance of a follow-up complaint reaching social media.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-service-1", "starRating": 1, "redactedQuote": "[REVIEWER] was ignored at the counter for ten minutes.", "themes": ["service"] }
      ]
    },
    {
      "patternId": "product-quality-batch-audit",
      "title": "Audit the batch / supplier behind the week's quality complaints",
      "tailoredBody": "One product-quality complaint landed Tuesday — cross-reference your delivery logs around that date. A single bad batch is the most common explanation for an isolated quality drop.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-quality-1", "starRating": 2, "redactedQuote": "The pastries were stale on Tuesday morning.", "themes": ["product_quality"] }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "overallTone": "concerning"
}</output>
